betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Misc Tools & Items§f

§aHandy tools to manage and transport fluids in your world!§f

§6Configurator§f (`pressure:configurator`):
§9Right-click§f on filterable blocks to open a GUI for filter settings. Works with: High Pressure Output/Input/Pump, Tank Fluid Filter, Fluid Drain, and EnderIO Fluid Conduits. Searchable fluid list — click to set filter, X to remove.

§6Hand Pump§f (`pressure:hand_pump`):
Sucks fluids from the world and tanks into Canisters in your inventory. Also works with other IFluidContainerItem items (e.g., TE portable tanks).

§6Canister§f (`pressure:canister`):
Portable fluid container holding up to §b64 buckets§f. §9Right-click§f on tanks/machines to fill. Can be filled/drained via Hand Pump and in compatible tanks/machines.

§6Infinite Water Source§f (`pressure:water_source`):
A truly §binfinite§f water source block. Pipe water out with a Pump, powered High Pressure Input, or pipes from other mods.

§6Creative Fluid Source§f (`pressure:creative_source`):
A creative-mode block that provides unlimited fluid for testing.
